name: Baby Spinach Salad with Grilled Onions,tomato
recipeInstructions:
To prepare the dressing, place the tomato paste, tamarind pulp, shallot, and vinegar in a blender. Mix well. Slowly add the olive oil, drop by drop at first, then in a slow and steady stream until all is incorporated. Add the salt. The dressing can be kept refrigerated for up to 1 week.
To prepare the onions, peel and slice one large red onion thick enough so you can handle the slices without them falling apart when cooked. Rub with a little olive oil and cook over a charcoal fire or under a hot broiler until soft (approximately 5 to 6 minutes per side). Toss in a bowl with 1-1/2 tablespoons balsamic vinegar so that the slices become single rings. These will keep refrigerated for up to 3 days.
To assemble the salad, wash and dry one medium handful (about 1 cup) spinach for each portion. Toss with enough dressing to coat each leaf without over-dressing. Arrange the onions over the salad and serve on chilled plates.
